items.title: Anthropic ships Claude Opus 4.7 with 1M context window
items.summary: Claude Opus 4.7 expands the context window to 1M tokens. Overnight: independent benchmark numbers (LongBench, RULER) confirm strong retrieval at 800K+ tokens; pricing drops 15% on cached input vs. 4.6.
items.why_it_matters: 1M context means dropping a full codebase or a long book in one shot is now practical. Cached pricing makes long-context patterns affordable enough to actually try in your Python projects.

revisions.change: added independent benchmark context + pricing detail

takes.take: Notes the throughput numbers and a real-world long-context retrieval test.
Top comment is mostly skepticism on price-vs-capability vs. competitors.
Independent test on a 700K-token codebase shows strong retrieval but slow first-token latency.

items.title: Tauri 2.1 ships with smaller binary footprint
items.summary: Tauri 2.1 reduces minimum binary size by 18% via tree-shaking improvements. Comments overnight focused on the iOS-side regression that 2.1.1 will likely patch within the week.
items.why_it_matters: If you're curious about shipping a desktop app from web tech, Tauri is the sane Rust-backed alternative to Electron. Wait a few days for 2.1.1 if you're starting fresh.

items.title: Alibaba's Qwen3 gets a coder-specialized variant
items.summary: Alibaba released Qwen3-Coder, a specialized fork tuned on a curated code dataset. Asia-time release means the Western news cycle picks it up tomorrow.
items.why_it_matters: Coder-specialized open models are good for offline / private use cases. If you ever want code completion that doesn't talk to a cloud, this is the kind of model to look at.

items.title: Vercel AI SDK 5.0 adds streaming to React Server Components
items.summary: Vercel's AI SDK 5.0 lets you stream model output directly into React Server Components, removing a layer of plumbing that used to live in API routes.
items.why_it_matters: If you ever explore React for a side project, this is the easiest way to wire in a model. The plumbing it removes is the kind of boilerplate that used to be a tutorial in itself.

dropped_in_phase.reason: rumor with no follow-up substance overnight, low signal
no new context overnight; original coverage stands
no overnight chatter, shallow product launch
